title: Cyril Amarchand Mangaldas advises TruBridge on ~$565‑million acquisition by IKS Health
description: Inventurus Knowledge Solutions Limited (IKS Health), through its US subsidiary Inventurus Knowledge Solutions, Inc., has acquired TruBridge, Inc. for up to $565 million.Cyril Amarchand Mangaldas advised TruBridge, Inc. on its binding merger agreement for the acquisition.The transaction team was led by Bhargav Joshi (Partner), with assistance from Associates Saumya Sharma, Ayushi Agarwal, SB Aditi, Arushi Kankariya, Roshan Cyriac, and Ratna PandeyRishabh Shroff (Partner, Co-Head - Private Cl
